library.title: Local Anime Library
library.libraryPathHelp: Path to the directory where your media files are located. (Keep the format consistent)
library.additionalDirectoriesHelp: Include additional directory paths if your library is spread across multiple locations.
library.enableAutoUpdateProgressHelp: Automatically update your progress on AniList when you watch episodes.
library.autoScanHelp: Automatically scan the library when file changes are detected.
library.autoScanMoreHelp: When batches are added, not all files are guaranteed to be detected.
library.refreshOnStartupHelp: Refresh the local anime library when Seanime starts.
library.scannerConfigHelp: Configure advanced scanner rules in JSON format. This allows you to define custom matching and hydration rules for your library.
library.scannerMatchingAlgorithmHelp: The algorithm used to match anime files.
library.scannerUseLegacyMatchingHelp: Enable to use the legacy matching algorithms. (Versions 3.4 and below)
library.scannerUseLegacyMatchingMoreHelp: The legacy matching algorithm uses simpler methods that may be less accurate.
library.scannerMatchingThresholdHelp: The matching threshold for matching anime files.
library.openTorrentClientOnStartHelp: Opens the configured torrent client when Seanime starts.
library.autoPlayNextEpisodeHelp: Automatically play the next episode when the current one ends.
library.enableWatchContinuityHelp: Maintain and restore your playback position in episodes.
library.dohProviderHelp: DNS over HTTPS provider for resolving domain names.
library.enableOnlinestreamHelp: Watch anime episodes from online sources.
library.includeOnlineStreamingInLibraryHelp: Add non-downloaded shows that are in your 'Currently Watching' list to the library.
library.autoSyncOfflineLocalDataHelp: Automatically sync your offline local data.
library.autoSyncToLocalAccountHelp: Automatically sync your progress with your local account.
library.autoSaveCurrentMediaOfflineHelp: Automatically save the current media offline.
library.useFallbackMetadataProviderHelp: Use a fallback metadata provider if the primary one fails.
